query:
SELECT de.indication, COUNT(*) as count
FROM drug_entries de
WHERE de.icd_codes_raw = '' OR de.icd_codes_raw IS NULL
GROUP BY de.indication
ORDER BY count DESC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4Lfvuvpa4KoYTbU.root --database a2JMvfTkjxD7rpSD5GgnMY --execute SELECT de.indication, COUNT(*) as count
FROM drug_entries de
WHERE de.icd_codes_raw = '' OR de.icd_codes_raw IS NULL
GROUP BY de.indication
ORDER BY count DESC
